ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>3<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: Balances context and persona but lacks some naturalness in language use, slightly inconsistent with the Old Merchant's talkative nature.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>3<TAB>Short note: Maintains consistency and persona but fails to address context relevance effectively; also, tone seems too formal for the scenario's naturalness score.
